case_title: BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO VS TORRES, ROMEO

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES, ROMEO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-07-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
